description.en: Create a new subscriber segment for an email list based on positive and negative tag filters.
description.de: Ein neues Abonnentensegment für eine E-Mail-Liste basierend auf positiven und negativen Tag-Filtern erstellen.
description.es: Create a new subscriber segment for an email list based on positive and negative tag filters.
description.fr: Create a new subscriber segment for an email list based on positive and negative tag filters.
description.ro: Create a new subscriber segment for an email list based on positive and negative tag filters.
description.it: Create a new subscriber segment for an email list based on positive and negative tag filters.

description.en: The UUID of the email list.
description.es: The UUID of the email list.
description.fr: The UUID of the email list.
description.ro: The UUID of the email list.
description.it: The UUID of the email list.

description.en: JSON array of tag names subscribers must have, e.g. ["premium"].
description.es: JSON array of tag names subscribers must have, e.g. ["premium"].
description.fr: JSON array of tag names subscribers must have, e.g. ["premium"].
description.ro: JSON array of tag names subscribers must have, e.g. ["premium"].
description.it: JSON array of tag names subscribers must have, e.g. ["premium"].

description.en: JSON array of tag names subscribers must NOT have, e.g. ["unsubscribed"].
description.es: JSON array of tag names subscribers must NOT have, e.g. ["unsubscribed"].
description.fr: JSON array of tag names subscribers must NOT have, e.g. ["unsubscribed"].
description.ro: JSON array of tag names subscribers must NOT have, e.g. ["unsubscribed"].
description.it: JSON array of tag names subscribers must NOT have, e.g. ["unsubscribed"].

description.en: If true, subscriber must have ALL positive tags. If false, any positive tag matches.
description.es: If true, subscriber must have ALL positive tags. If false, any positive tag matches.
description.fr: If true, subscriber must have ALL positive tags. If false, any positive tag matches.
